Q1 2026 · Published April 2026
The SIQA AI Music
Intelligence Report
The first comprehensive look at AI music performance. Charts, analysis, and the stories behind a defining quarter.
Read the full report

Contents
What's inside
Six sections across charts, analysis, and methodology.
01 / The charts
Top 100 AI Songs
The definitive ranking across streaming, airplay, and social impact.
02 / Production
AI Music Tools
The production tools behind this quarter's top tracks, and how they're being used in the creation process.
03 / Feature story
The Jacub breakthrough
A banned Swedish AI song, now charting in the Top 10.
04 / Distribution
Distribution Landscape
The leading distributors behind this quarter's AI music releases.
05 / Methodology
How we measure
The scoring formula, eligibility rules, and verification process.
06 / Implications
What this means
Actionable takeaways for labels, DSPs, and investors.
"
Jacub's banned Swedish AI song is charting in the Top 10 on the SIQA Top 100 AI Songs chart: the first clear signal that AI music has
found its own place on the charts.
"
37.2%
female,
35.2%
male.
Female-presenting AI artists lead the full chart
, holding the pattern across eight of nine weeks in Q1.
From section 09 · Full chart gender patterns
About
The intelligence layer for AI music.
The Sonic Intelligence Academy (SIQA)
charts, verifies, and recognizes the artists shaping a new category of sound. Our quarterly reports translate raw data into the industry's definitive reference for AI-generated music performance. This is our first. New editions release every quarter.
